body:
Amara, hope you're having a good Sunday — I wanted to follow up on our conversation last week about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) portfolio and whether there's a fit with a few of the seed-stage founders I've been advising lately. One in particular is building grid-edge optimization software that I think aligns well with your climate infrastructure thesis, and I'd love to get your read on the space before I make any introductions. Would you be open to a 30-minute call sometime this week or next? I'm fairly flexible on timing and can work around your schedule.

Anna
